narrative_beat: Wide symmetric of three giant arched gates each with golden plaque VERDADE, PAZ, AMOR, P&B crowd with smartphones below

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: three colossal arched stone gates arranged in a row
subject.focal_point: each gate bearing a golden engraved plaque at its keystone reading VERDADE PAZ AMOR left to right
subject.secondary: A vast crowd of silhouetted contemporary people below with raised smartphones glowing cold blue, all in P&B.

composition.foreground: three plaques and gate edges in rich gold and crimson
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white gates, crowd and phones

lighting.key_light: divine vertical light on three gates
lighting.fill_light: cold crowd fill from phone glow

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: which ministry do you see operating today
symbolism.secondary: three gates as choice of recognition

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.font_style: bold engraved serif uppercase letters in polished warm gold
in_scene_text.medium: engraved on keystone plaques of each gate
in_scene_text.placement: three keystones top center of each gate

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

api_call_hints.critical_note_for_gemini: Three separate words on three separate plaques in Portuguese. Each plaque on its own gate keystone.
